## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Linked issue
- Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test done (if relevant)

## Evidence
- Screenshots / logs / notes:

## Risks / rollback
- Risks:
- Rollback plan:

## Release notes (user-facing)
- One short paragraph suitable for Telegram update.
